problems_encountered.description: Cannot execute project-invite-get because project-invite-list failed with 403 permission error. No valid invite ID available to test the get operation.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed due to missing dependency. The prerequisite project-invite-list operation failed with permission denied error.
execution_notes: Unable to obtain a valid invite ID from project-invite-list due to 403 error. The authenticated user lacks permissions to list or manage project invites. This tool requires an invite ID which cannot be obtained without list permissions.
